title: Mary Kay Bergman

'''Mary Kay Bergman''' was a voice actress who voiced [[Tomo]], as well as five other voices in the [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]].

Outside of ''[[Star Wars]]'', she is well-known for doing the voices of [[Wikipedia:Daphne Blake|Daphne Blake]] in three of the animated [[Wikipedia:Scooby-Doo|''Scooby-Doo'']] films, and for a while doing most of the female voices on the TV show [[Wikipedia:South Park|''South Park'']].

She did voices in many other films and television shows as well, such as [[Wikipedia:Toy Story 2|''Toy Story 2'']], [[Wikipedia:The Iron Giant|''The Iron Giant'']], [[Wikipedia:Beauty and the Beast (1991 film)|''Beauty and the Beast'']], [[Wikipedia:Mulan|''Mulan'']], [[Wikipedia:The Hunchback of Notre Dame (1996 film)|''The Hunchback of Notre Dame'']], [[Wikipedia:Hercules (1997 film)|''Hercules'']], and many more.

She committed suicide in West [[Wikipedia:Los Angeles|Los Angeles]], [[Wikipedia:California|California]] on [[November 11]], [[1999]].
